ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "bottom_length" INTEGER /* Bottom length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "top_length" INTEGER /* Top length measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_length" INTEGER /* Inseam length measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_width" INTEGER /* Sleeve width measurement in centimeters */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size specification of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the clothing item is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the clothing item is suitable for (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the clothing item is manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Slim Fit, Classic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the style is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the style is suitable for (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the item is located */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for triggering a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for the next reorder */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the item in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., Online, In-store) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "return_window_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date for the return window */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item (unit price * quantity + tax - discount) */,
  "backorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item that is backordered */,
  "fulfilled_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item that has been fulfilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for the customer */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred this customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the return is associated with */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item returned */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the returned item */,
  "return_shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_orders" (
  "supply_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier the order is placed with */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the supply order was placed */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the supply order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the supply order (e.g., pending, in transit, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the supply order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the supply order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the supply order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the supply order */,
  "items" TEXT /* JSON array of items included in the supply order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
